Name: eDCRule
Author: eDC ICE223 - ice223@acercsi.com
Description: The eDCRule solution for Microsoft Sentinel installs custom analytic rule templates.
WorkbookBladeDescription: This solution does not include workbooks.
AnalyticalRuleBladeDescription: This solution installs analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in the Manage solution view.
HuntingQueryBladeDescription: This solution does not include hunting queries.
PlaybooksBladeDescription: This solution does not include playbook templates.
